macos.notes: Gatekeeper requires Developer ID + staple; entitlements must match provisioning profile.

ios.tool: xcodebuild archive + export with signing team
ios.notes: Simulator builds unsigned; device/TestFlight need profiles and export plist.

android.notes: Play signing vs debug; minSdk must cover Credential Manager / FIDO2 APIs you use.

linux.tool: optional: gpg sign debs / flatpak-builder sign
linux.notes: Distribution-specific; Flatpak uses builder manifest signing.

windows.notes: EV cert recommended for SmartScreen; MSI from WiX signs separately.

macos.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Required for security keys and passkeys that connect over Bluetooth (WebAuthn).
macos.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Legacy Bluetooth dialog text; keep in sync with Always variant where applicable.
macos.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: If using LocalAuthentication for WebAuthn UI.
macos.NSCameraUsageDescription: If QR or document capture is added.
macos.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: If WebRTC or voice features are enabled.

ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Required for Bluetooth security keys (WebAuthn / FIDO2).
ios.com.apple.developer.associated-domains: Passkeys / web credentials; list applinks: and webcredentials: hosts.

android.BLUETOOTH_SCAN: Often required with neverForLocation for BLE scan without location.

linux.bluez: Flatpak: org.bluez or device access; desktop: user session Bluetooth via portal where available.

windows.webauthn: Uses OS WebAuthn API; Authenticode signing for binaries; optional app capability manifests for packaged MSIX.
